turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)

turns.text: One moment.

turns.text: This will help us check if your plan is accepted.

turns.text: Un nome.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Brian

turns.text: I see there's no insurance on file for you right now.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Let me know when you've finished or if you have any questions about the form.

turns.text: I understand, Brian. Once you upload your insurance card, I can check if your plan is accepted. If you'd like, you can tell me the name of your insurance company, and I'll check for you right now.
